/usr/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/CodexBalance.dir/objects.a
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/CodexBalance.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/CodexBalance.dir/objects1.rsp
/usr/bin/x86_64-w64-mingw32-g++ -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -shared -o ../plugins/CodexBalance.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libCodexBalance.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/CodexBalance.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles/CodexBalance.dir/linkLibs.rsp
